context: ad-hoc code review and surgical fix

completed_tasks.name: Review unet3d training support in current PR
completed_tasks.notes: Reviewed all three files changed in dec4d42: utils.py (read1 fix), cluster_collector.py (gather-always fix), test_cluster_collector.py (6 new tests)

completed_tasks.name: Identify remaining hang cause: fork()-after-MPI-init
completed_tasks.notes: Root cause: mpirun->DLIO rank (MPI_Init) -> DataLoader fork() -> orphan workers hold pipe write-end -> TextIOWrapper.read() blocks indefinitely after mpirun exits

completed_tasks.name: Apply surgical fix to CommandExecutor.execute() drain section
completed_tasks.notes: Replaced two blocking .read() calls with select()+read1() loop using 0.5s timeout. 176 unit tests pass.

remaining_tasks.name: Commit the fix
remaining_tasks.notes: mlpstorage_py/utils.py has the change staged but not committed

remaining_tasks.name: Optionally: address double cluster collection in DLIOBenchmark.__init__ vs base.Benchmark.run()
remaining_tasks.notes: Both call _collect_cluster_information() redundantly. Not a hang, just wasted time. Out of scope for this PR per user's late-release constraint.

human_actions_pending.action: Review and commit the utils.py fix
human_actions_pending.context: One uncommitted file: mlpstorage_py/utils.py with the select-based drain replacing blocking .read() calls

decisions.decision: Use select()+read1() with 0.5s timeout instead of blocking .read()
decisions.rationale: When pipe write-end is closed (normal case) select() returns immediately on EOF — zero latency. When orphaned grandchildren hold it open, times out after 0.5s and un-sticks the orchestrator.

decisions.decision: Do NOT add process-group management (start_new_session=True + os.killpg)
decisions.rationale: More invasive, changes mpirun's session/signal handling. The drain timeout achieves the same unblock with minimal surface area.

decisions.decision: Keep double cluster collection (DLIOBenchmark.__init__ + base.Benchmark.run()) out of scope
decisions.rationale: User is late in release cycle; only fix minimum required. Double collection is a redundancy/perf issue, not a hang.

next_action: git add mlpstorage_py/utils.py && git commit with message describing the fork()-after-MPI-init fix
context_notes: This is on branch FileSystemGuy-une3d-hang. The PR already has two fixes in dec4d42 (read1 for readline hang, gather-always for MPI deadlock). This session added a third fix for the pipe drain hang caused by orphaned DataLoader workers. All 176 runnable unit tests pass.
